title: Xenial Molten Chinese Lentils Char Siu Bao
description: A Buddhist-friendly, indulgent Chinese dish featuring roasted lentils, spherified and served in a Char Siu Bao bun. This dish is a unique twist on traditional Jiangsu cuisine.
instructions: Mix lentils, rice vinegar, soy sauce, olive oil, and Char Siu sauce in a bowl.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the star anise and ginger.
Add the lentil mixture to the pan and stir to combine with the star anise and ginger.
In a separate bowl, mix yeast and flour to create a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape into buns.
Place the lentil mixture into the buns and seal the edges.
Heat a pan with sesame oil over medium heat and cook the buns until golden brown.
Spherify the lentil mixture using sodium alginate and water.
Serve the spherified lentil mixture in the Char Siu Bao buns.
